chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.2183 of 2025 ____________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ____________________________________________________ For hearing of bail application 1. For Orders on M.A. No.11887/2025 2. For Orders on M.A. No.11888/2025 3. For hearing of Bail Application 26.08.2025 Syed Ghulam Hasnain, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. ---------------------------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this bail application the applicant / accused namely Muhammad Ali Hasnain seeks protective bail in Crime No.1296 of 2025 under Sections 506 of PPC, 25-D of Telegraph Act, 1885 registered at Police Station Quaid-e-Azam Industrial Area, Lahore. Learned counsel for the applicant contends that the applicant has been falsely implicated in the instant case, however, the applicant intends to surrender before the trial Court to obtain pre-arrest bail but apprehends his arrest at the doorstep of the Court at the hands of police in order to humiliate and disgrace him. Hence, he has prayed for protection. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, applicant/accused namely Muhammad Ali Hasnain is granted protective bail for a period of ten days from today enabling him to surrender before the trial Court subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for ten days from today or on the date when the applicant will surrender before the trial Court, whichever is earlier.

Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for ten days from today or on the date when the applicant will surrender before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Asif
